description: Configure a threshold-based alert in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus to detect potential data sabotage. Create a new Alert Profile named 'Mass File Deletion Incident' with the following configuration: Category 'File Audit > File Deleted', Severity 'Critical', Threshold of more than 50 events within 1 minute, and exclude the user 'BackupSvc' from triggering the alert. Log in using the credentials 'admin' / 'Admin@2024'. Save a screenshot of the configured alert profile settings to 'C:\workspace\mass_deletion_alert_evidence.png'.
